demo_timestamps.description: Checking if relevant data is present in models
Logging in and configuring models with APS and Forge
Selecting elements in the viewer to see database data
Filling data for multiple elements simultaneously and visualizing installations
Extracting and presenting engineering data in a connected data platform

themes: Data management and automation using Autodesk technologies
Enhancing data accuracy and decision making in projects

client_mentions.name: SBE
client_mentions.context: Independent engineering design consultancy company using Autodesk solutions

client_mentions.name: AWV
client_mentions.context: Mentioned in context of object type library

summary: The video explains how SBE, an engineering consultancy, used Autodesk tools like APS, Revit, and AutoCAD to automate object type library compliance within Autodesk Construction Cloud, significantly reducing manual setup time and improving data management specifically for Agenskapiegen Everkir's requirements. It highlights the benefits of integrating various Autodesk products to enhance data accuracy and decision-making in engineering projects, and discusses SBE's future goals of collaborating with Autodesk to leverage digital twins and standardized data workflows.
